channel.title: Multilingual Applications on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Multilingual Applications on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Azure Translator API Version 2026‑06‑06 (GA): Supporting Multilingual Applications with Flexible Translation Options
item.description:
Azure Translator API version 2026-06-06 is now generally available. It adds flexible translation options intended to combine NMT speed, LLM-style fluency, and adaptive translation in a single API.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
